svg.title: AI Talent Intelligence Platform — Wish-to-Team Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram showing how a Product Owner's wish flows through AI decomposition, domain expert consultation, and talent matching layers

g.text: Writes a wish / idea in natural language
Decides which SMEs are needed before team assembly

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the UX Expert consultation work in this system?')
sendPrompt('How does a Domain SME like a speaker engineer consult in this system?')
sendPrompt('What other experts might the router choose beyond UX and Domain SME?')

g.text: Merges wish + SME inputs into structured skill requirements
Hands-on vs theoretical · seniority level · team topology
Skill extraction (LLM) · hands-on vs theoretical classification
Pydantic models · PostgreSQL employee profile DB
Recency tracking · direction analysis · GitHub scoring
Skill matching against enriched requirements · relevance score
Ranked team candidates · SME-validated skill proof
Clarifying questions if wish was ambiguous
